user.title: Connect to AFERIY PS240 (Local)
user.description: Enter the local network details for your AFERIY PS240 battery. The battery must be reachable at the given IP before you can continue.

data_description.host: Static local IP of your battery (e.g. 192.168.0.100)
data_description.port: TCP port the battery listens on (typically 8080)
data_description.name: Friendly name shown in Home Assistant

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect - check the IP, port, and that the battery is online.
error.unknown: Unexpected error - see the Home Assistant log for details.

init.title: Reconfigure AFERIY PS240 (Local)
init.description: Update the connection details. Home Assistant will reconnect immediately.

data_description.advanced_energy_sensors: Adds optional estimate sensors that can use external grid, solar forecast, and household demand entities. Leave disabled for the clean core battery integration.
data_description.poll_interval: How often to poll the battery locally, in seconds. Lower values update faster but create more traffic.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect - check the IP, port, and that the battery is online.
error.unknown: Unexpected error - see the Home Assistant log for details.
